coachAM: Your "lock in young" vision is collapsing under the weight of undisciplined inputs and a fragmented morning, evident in the cascading failure of your Sleep Protocol, Training, and Sovereign Morning habits, where the lure of "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" and the lack of evening reflection are directly sabotaging your ability to execute against your stated intentions for discipline and efficiency. The root cause is a profound internal misalignment between your declared aspirations ("best worker, best seller, charismatic with disciplina and efficiency") and your actual daily commitment to the foundational disciplines that create that reality, eroding the spiritual and physical resilience required for sustained elite performance. Today, before *any* other input, send a single, clear email to your Civora team outlining your #1 priority for them this week, then immediately close all social media tabs.
